title: Session 14 — The Grove
bodyText:
**TL;DR: Trunks buried and the hunter burned, Cumb let out of the bag; Michael the myconid led them to Kennarea's grove, and downriver they met the necromancer Eira — who shares Felson's surname Cavernborn — while Brolin's magic faltered.**

# What happened
- Recovery: **[[pc-eddy|Eddy]] took the cursed sword**; a small **burial for [[pc-trunks|Trunks]]**; the horned figure's remains were wisely **burned**.
- **[[cumb]] was let out of the bag** (deal: roam by day, bag at night — after heated words about broken promises).
- **[[michael-myconid]]** the myconid guided them to the **grove gates**, where at the heart of a breathing mushroom-forest amphitheater they met **[[kennarea|Kennarea]] (Kena)** — the vine-limbed drow druid.
- She apologized for sealing the grove mid-battle; after [[pc-brolin|Brolin]]'s persuasion she let Michael stay with the party and gave them rest.
- Downriver, past nets over phosphorescent water, they found a ramshackle laboratory-hut strewn with blood and bones — and met **[[eira-cavernborn|Eira]]**, a manic, lonely young dwarf **necromancer** (her rat Gerald "isn't much of a conversationalist").
- Morning brought unease: **Brolin's magic was faltering**.
- Swapping stories, they discovered **Eira and [[pc-felson|Felson]] share the surname Cavernborn.**

# Fired / left smoking
- [x] Trunks buried; the horned figure's remains burned.
- [x] Cumb out of the bag — roam-by-day deal struck.
- Eddy took the cursed sword.
- Brolin's magic is faltering.
- Eira and Felson share the surname Cavernborn.

# Threads
[[kennarea]] · [[eira-cavernborn]] · [[michael-myconid]] · [[cumb]] · [[pc-felson]]
